# Edu Lead International

> Edu Lead International is a professional learning organisation for teachers,
> school leaders, and educational institutions. It is listed as Cambridge
> Professional Development Centre IA076 in India.

Official website: https://eduleadinternational.in/

## Cambridge Professional Development Qualifications

- [Teaching and Learning](https://eduleadinternational.in/teaching-learning.html):
  Cambridge International Certificate and Diploma in Teaching and Learning for
  practising teachers. Online delivery with mentoring, guided learning, and
  e-portfolio support.
- [Educational Leadership](https://eduleadinternational.in/educational-leadership.html):
  Cambridge International Certificate and Diploma in Educational Leadership
  for current and aspiring educational leaders.

Cambridge recognition applies to these two Cambridge PDQ programmes. It does
not apply to Edu Lead International's independent CPD Online or Certified
Training programmes.

## Edu Lead Programmes

- [CPD Online](https://eduleadinternational.in/cpd-online.html): a four-month,
  30-hour online professional development programme for teachers and school
  administrators.
- [Certified Training](https://eduleadinternational.in/certified-training.html):
  customised online and in-person training for educational institutions across
  India.
- [All Courses](https://eduleadinternational.in/courses.html)

- [Cambridge PDQ distinction holders](https://eduleadinternational.in/results.html)
